mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.create_by AS "createBy.id", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.draft_id AS "draftId", a.version_no AS "versionNo", a.parent_version_id AS "parentVersionId", a.name AS "name", a.prompt AS "prompt", a.clarify_answers_json AS "clarifyAnswersJson", a.dsl_version AS "dslVersion", a.dsl_json AS "dslJson", a.schema_issues_json AS "schemaIssuesJson", a.design_issues_json AS "designIssuesJson", a.schema_summary_json AS "schemaSummaryJson", a.design_summary_json AS "designSummaryJson", a.preview_summary_json AS "previewSummaryJson", a.checksum AS "checksum", a.dsl_size AS "dslSize"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ai_form_design_draft_version a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM ai_form_design_draft_version a WHERE a.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL} ORDER BY a.create_date DESC

SELECT
FROM ai_form_design_draft_version a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.draft_id = #{draftId} ORDER BY a.version_no ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_form_design_draft_version a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.draft_id = #{draftId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_form_design_draft_version( id, create_by, create_date, del_flag, draft_id, version_no, parent_version_id, name, prompt, clarify_answers_json, dsl_version, dsl_json, schema_issues_json, design_issues_json, schema_summary_json, design_summary_json, preview_summary_json, checksum, dsl_size ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{createBy.id}, #{createDate}, #{delFlag}, #{draftId}, #{versionNo}, #{parentVersionId}, #{name}, #{prompt}, #{clarifyAnswersJson}, #{dslVersion}, #{dslJson}, #{schemaIssuesJson}, #{designIssuesJson}, #{schemaSummaryJson}, #{designSummaryJson}, #{previewSummaryJson}, #{checksum}, #{dslSize} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_form_design_draft_version SET draft_id = #{draftId}, version_no = #{versionNo}, parent_version_id = #{parentVersionId}, name = #{name}, prompt = #{prompt}, clarify_answers_json = #{clarifyAnswersJson}, dsl_version = #{dslVersion}, dsl_json = #{dslJson}, schema_issues_json = #{schemaIssuesJson}, design_issues_json = #{designIssuesJson}, schema_summary_json = #{schemaSummaryJson}, design_summary_json = #{designSummaryJson}, preview_summary_json = #{previewSummaryJson}, checksum = #{checksum}, dsl_size = #{dslSize} WHERE id = #{id}
